video_type.reasoning: 7-8 distinct live approaches to different women interspersed with teaching commentary and breakdowns. Coach demonstrates canned openers, then progressively more elaborated openers, with analysis between each.

transcript_confidence.reasoning: Diarization heavily merges target speech into coach speaker IDs throughout. Many approach segments contain interleaved coach+target dialogue under a single SPEAKER_01 label. Early sections entirely lowercase/unpunctuated. Several segments are garbled where rapid back-and-forth was poorly captured. SPEAKER_00 appears briefly (78-79) likely same coach from different recording conditions.

Segment 107: End transitions back to commentary ('that's another instance of how') — marked mixed
Confirmed all opener-delivering speakers marked as coach, never target

conversations.description: First demo approach — 'I thought you were cute' canned opener. Brief but positive interaction including fist bump. Coach cut it short for filming but notes it became a 30-min interaction.
Brief/aborted approach attempt — coach delivers 'interesting look' opener but no visible target response captured. Likely a quick pass or editing artifact.
Second main demo — 'interesting look' opener to woman on phone with boyfriend. She politely declines, says she's on phone with boyfriend but appreciates the compliment.
Approach demo clip — elaborated opener commenting on woman's 'all black' outfit while she's sitting. SPEAKER_00 delivers (likely same coach, different recording).
Quick approach — 'you look very cute today' to woman eating/tanning on a Tuesday afternoon. Brief exchange.
Approach to woman in beige top and jean shorts — elaborated style compliment. Target doesn't speak good English but responds positively. Coach had to simplify his language.
Quick approach — 'interesting look, white and black sporty fit' opener. Target says thank you. Brief positive exchange.

Extended approach — elaborated opener about beige/Zara style, flows into full conversation about travel plans and spontaneity. Ends with WhatsApp number exchange. ~12-15 minute interaction (most not captured on film).
